metrics.name: GDP deflator (annual %)
metrics.notes: Broad domestic price inflation proxy, not tourist-specific prices. Rough affordability signal.

metrics.name: Exports of goods and services (% of GDP)
metrics.notes: Trade openness / export-oriented-ness. Secondary economic context, not directly tied to travel costs.

metrics.name: PPP conversion factor, GDP (LCU per international $)
metrics.notes: Local currency units per international dollar. USA = 1 by definition. Core input for cost-of-living conversions.

metrics.name: Price level index (GDP)
metrics.notes: PPP conversion factor divided by market exchange rate, rebased so USA = 100. Directly interpretable affordability ratio -- no currency conversion step needed.
